glosses.ro: a se scufunda; a se prăbuși

sentences.target: Le bateau sombre près du vieux port.
sentences.reading: /lə bato sɔ̃bʁ pʁɛ dy vjø pɔʁ/

translations.fr: Le bateau sombre près du vieux port.
translations.ipa: /lə bato sɔ̃bʁ pʁɛ dy vjø pɔʁ/
translations.en: The boat is sinking near the old harbor.
translations.es: El barco se está hundiendo cerca del puerto antiguo.
translations.de: Das Boot sinkt in der Nähe des alten Hafens.
translations.it: La barca sta affondando vicino al porto vecchio.
translations.ko: 배가 오래된 항구 근처에서 가라앉고 있어요.
translations.yue: 隻船喺舊碼頭附近下沉。
translations.ru: Лодка тонет рядом со старым портом.
translations.pt: O barco está afundando perto do porto antigo.
translations.vi: Con thuyền đang chìm gần cảng cũ.
translations.nl: De boot zinkt bij de oude haven.
translations.hu: A hajó süllyed a régi kikötő közelében.
translations.hi: नाव पुराने बंदरगाह के पास डूब रही है.
translations.pl: Łódź tonie w pobliżu starego portu.
translations.el: Το σκάφος βυθίζεται κοντά στο παλιό λιμάνι.
translations.nb: Båten synker ved den gamle havnen.
translations.id: Perahu itu sedang tenggelam di dekat pelabuhan tua.
translations.sv: Båten sjunker nära den gamla hamnen.
translations.ro: Barca se scufundă lângă vechiul port.
translations.cs: Loď se potápí poblíž starého přístavu.
translations.da: Båden synker nær den gamle havn.
translations.ja: ボートが古い港の近くで沈んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the noun 'bateau'; marks definiteness.
Common noun (masculine singular); subject of the verb 'sombre'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) of 'sombrer'; intransitive, agrees with 'bateau'.
Adverb forming the fixed expression 'près de' to indicate proximity.
Preposition 'de' contracted with the article 'le' (de+le); introduces the noun 'port' after 'près'.
Adjective (masculine singular) modifying 'port'.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition 'du' within the locative phrase.

sentences.target: Je refuse de sombrer dans la routine.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁəfyz də sɔ̃bʁe dɑ̃ la ʁutin/

translations.fr: Je refuse de sombrer dans la routine.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁəfyz də sɔ̃bʁe dɑ̃ la ʁutin/
translations.en: I refuse to sink into routine.
translations.es: Me niego a caer en la rutina.
translations.de: Ich will nicht in Routine verfallen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我拒绝陷入一成不变的日常。
translations.yue: 我拒絕陷入一成不變嘅日常。
translations.vi: Tôi từ chối rơi vào lối mòn.
translations.nl: Ik weiger in de sleur te vervallen.
translations.hu: Nem vagyok hajlandó belesüppedni a rutinba.
translations.hi: मैं दिनचर्या में डूबने से इनकार करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Nie pozwolę sobie popaść w rutynę.
translations.nb: Jeg nekter å falle inn i rutine.
translations.sv: Jag vägrar att falla in i rutiner.
translations.ro: Refuz să mă afund în rutină.
translations.da: Jeg nægter at falde i rutine.
translations.ja: ルーティンに陥ることを拒む。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular); subject of 'refuse'.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); selects an infinitival complement with 'de'.
Prepositional marker introducing the infinitive 'sombrer' after 'refuser'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'refuse'.
Preposition introducing the locative/complement 'la routine'.
Definite article (feminine singular) introducing 'routine'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Nous sombrons de fatigue en fin de journée.
sentences.reading: /nu sɔ̃bʁɔ̃ də fatiɡ ɑ̃ fɛ̃ də ʒuʁne/

translations.fr: Nous sombrons de fatigue en fin de journée.
translations.ipa: /nu sɔ̃bʁɔ̃ də fatiɡ ɑ̃ fɛ̃ də ʒuʁne/
translations.en: We sink from fatigue at the end of the day.
translations.es: Al final del día nos caemos de cansancio.
translations.de: Am Ende des Tages sind wir todmüde.
translations.it: A fine giornata crolliamo dalla stanchezza.
translations.ko: 하루가 끝나면 우리는 피곤해서 녹초가 된다.
translations.zh-Hans: 一天结束时我们累得要倒下。
translations.ru: В конце дня мы валимся с ног от усталости.
translations.pt: No fim do dia desabamos de cansaço.
translations.vi: Cuối ngày chúng tôi kiệt sức vì mệt.
translations.ar: في نهاية اليوم ننهار من شدة التعب.
translations.nl: Aan het einde van de dag storten we in van vermoeidheid.
translations.uk: Наприкінці дня ми валимося з ніг від втоми.
translations.hi: दिन के अंत तक हम थक कर चूर हो जाते हैं.
translations.pl: Pod koniec dnia padamy ze zmęczenia.
translations.el: Στο τέλος της μέρας καταρρέουμε από την κούραση.
translations.nb: På slutten av dagen stuper vi av tretthet.
translations.id: Di akhir hari kami ambruk karena lelah.
translations.sv: I slutet av dagen faller vi ihop av trötthet.
translations.ro: La sfârșitul zilei cădem de oboseală.
translations.da: Ved dagens ende falder vi om af træthed.
translations.ja: 一日の終わりには私たちは疲れ切って倒れそうになる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person plural); subject of 'sombrons'.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person plural) of 'sombrer'; used in a figurative sense here.
Preposition indicating cause ('de fatigue').
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'de' expressing cause.
Preposition introducing the temporal phrase 'fin de journée'.
Common noun (feminine singular) within the prepositional phrase 'en fin de journée'.
Preposition linking 'fin' to 'journée' ('end of day').
Common noun (feminine singular); complement of 'de' in the temporal expression.

sentences.target: Ne laissez pas votre projet sombrer maintenant.
sentences.reading: /nə lɛse pɑ vɔtʁ pʁɔʒɛ sɔ̃bʁe mɛ̃tnɑ̃/

translations.fr: Ne laissez pas votre projet sombrer maintenant.
translations.ipa: /nə lɛse pɑ vɔtʁ pʁɔʒɛ sɔ̃bʁe mɛ̃tnɑ̃/
translations.en: Don't let your project sink now.
translations.es: No dejes que tu proyecto se hunda ahora.
translations.de: Lass dein Projekt jetzt nicht untergehen.
translations.it: Non lasciare che il tuo progetto affondi adesso.
translations.ko: 지금 당신의 프로젝트가 가라앉게 두지 마세요.
translations.zh-Hans: 现在别让你的项目沉没。
translations.yue: 而家唔好畀你嘅項目沉沒。
translations.ru: Не дайте вашему проекту утонуть сейчас.
translations.pt: Não deixe seu projeto afundar agora.
translations.he: אל תיתן לפרויקט שלך לשקוע עכשיו.
translations.vi: Đừng để dự án của bạn chìm lúc này.
translations.nl: Laat je project nu niet zinken.
translations.uk: Не дайте своєму проєкту зараз потонути.
translations.hu: Ne hagyd, hogy a projekted most elsüllyedjen.
translations.hi: अब अपने प्रोजेक्ट को डूबने मत दो.
translations.pl: Nie pozwól, by twój projekt teraz utonął.
translations.el: Μην αφήσεις το έργο σου να βυθιστεί τώρα.
translations.nb: La ikke prosjektet ditt synke nå.
translations.id: Jangan biarkan proyek Anda tenggelam sekarang.
translations.sv: Låt inte ditt projekt sjunka nu.
translations.ro: Nu lăsa proiectul tău să se scufunde acum.
translations.cs: Nedovol, aby se tvůj projekt teď potopil.
translations.da: Lad ikke dit projekt synke nu.
translations.ja: 今はプロジェクトを沈ませないでください。

tokens.explanation: Negation particle; part of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas' placed before the verb.
Main verb (imperative, 2nd person plural); forms a causative construction with the infinitive 'sombrer'.
Negative adverb completing 'ne' in the standard negation 'ne ... pas'.
Possessive determiner modifying 'projet' (2nd person plural/formal).
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'laissez'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the causative 'laisser'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time of the action.
